# services.phpfpm

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.phpfpm`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.phpfpm.extraConfig` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra configuration that should be put in the global section of the PHP-FPM configuration file. Do not specify the options `error_log` or `daemonize` here, since they are generated by NixOS. |
| `services.phpfpm.phpOptions` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Options appended to the PHP configuration file {file}`php.ini`. |
| `services.phpfpm.phpPackage` | `package` | The php package to use. |
| `services.phpfpm.pools` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | PHP-FPM pools. If no pools are defined, the PHP-FPM service is disabled. |
| `services.phpfpm.pools.<name>.extraConfig` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra lines that go into the pool configuration. See the documentation on `php-fpm.conf` for details on configuration directives. |
| `services.phpfpm.pools.<name>.group` | `string` | Group account under which this pool runs. |
| `services.phpfpm.pools.<name>.listen` | `string` | The address on which to accept FastCGI requests. |
| `services.phpfpm.pools.<name>.phpEnv` | `attribute set of string` | Environment variables used for this PHP-FPM pool. |
| `services.phpfpm.pools.<name>.phpOptions` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | "Options appended to the PHP configuration file {file}`php.ini` used for this PHP-FPM pool." |
| `services.phpfpm.pools.<name>.phpPackage` | `package` | The PHP package to use for running this PHP-FPM pool. |
| `services.phpfpm.pools.<name>.settings` | `attribute set of (string or signed integer or boolean)` | PHP-FPM pool directives. Refer to the "List of pool directives" section of <https://www.php.net/manual/en/install.fpm.configuration.php> for details. Note that settings names must be enclosed in quotes (e.g. `"pm.max_children"` instead of `pm.max_children`). |
| `services.phpfpm.pools.<name>.socket` | `string` | Path to the unix socket file on which to accept FastCGI requests. ::: {.note} This option is read-only and managed by NixOS. ::: |
| `services.phpfpm.pools.<name>.user` | `string` | User account under which this pool runs. |
| `services.phpfpm.settings` | `attribute set of (string or signed integer or boolean)` | PHP-FPM global directives. Refer to the "List of global php-fpm.conf directives" section of <https://www.php.net/manual/en/install.fpm.configuration.php> for details. Note that settings names must be enclosed in quotes (e.g. `"pm.max_children"` instead of `pm.max_children`). You need not specify the options `error_log` or `daemonize` here, since they are generated by NixOS. |
